title: cephalaria squamiflora subsp. squamiflora
intro: Cephalaria squamiflora subsp. squamiflora, also known as the scabious or squamiflora cephalaria, is a plant species in the honeysuckle family, Caprifoliaceae. It is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, valued for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of Cephalaria squamiflora subsp. squamiflora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions.
